word: H2747 - חֶרֶט - chereṭ - kheh'-ret - Graving tool

sections.paragraph:
Original: חרט

Transliteration: chereṭ

Phonetic: kheh'-ret

BDB Definition:

  1. an engraving tool, stylus, chisel, graving tool
    1. graving tool
    2. stylus

Origin: from a primitive root meaning to engrave

TWOT entry: 738a

Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine
